name: Banana Cream Brownie Squares
recipeIngredient: 5.1 oz package instant vanilla pudding and pie filling
8 oz container frozen whipped topping, thawed
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Chop peanuts.
3. Prepare brownie mix according to package directions; stir in half cup chopped peanuts.
4. Pour into 9-inch square baking pan.
5. Bake for 24-27 minutes, then cool completely.
6. Slice 2 bananas using a knife or egg slicer.
7. Layer over brownies.
8. In a bowl, whisk pudding mix into milk; beat until mixture just begins to thicken.
9. Fold in half cup whipped topping. Spread pudding mixture over sliced bananas.
10. Refrigerate for 30 minutes.
11. Sprinkle remaining peanuts over top of pudding mixture.
12. Garnish with remaining whipped topping.
13. To serve, cut into squares and pipe with whipped topping.
14. Slice remaining banana and strawberries; top each square with slices.
